# HBoxContainer

**Inherits:** [BoxContainer](class_boxcontainer.md#class-boxcontainer) **<** [Container](class_container.md#class-container) **<** [Control](class_control.md#class-control) **<** [CanvasItem](class_canvasitem.md#class-canvasitem) **<** [Node](class_node.md#class-node) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

**Inherited By:** [EditorResourcePicker](class_editorresourcepicker.md#class-editorresourcepicker), [EditorToaster](class_editortoaster.md#class-editortoaster), [OpenXRInteractionProfileEditorBase](class_openxrinteractionprofileeditorbase.md#class-openxrinteractionprofileeditorbase)

A container that arranges its child controls horizontally.

## Description

A variant of [BoxContainer](class_boxcontainer.md#class-boxcontainer) that can only arrange its child controls horizontally. Child controls are rearranged automatically when their minimum size changes.
